description:
I need to scrape some basic information from a webpage using a headless browser. Can you help me extract data from the Hacker News homepage?

Please use a headless browser (like Puppeteer with Node.js or Playwright) to visit https://news.ycombinator.com and extract the titles of the top 5 stories displayed on the front page.

Save the extracted titles to a file at /home/user/project/scraped_data/hn_titles.txt with the following format:
- Each title should be on its own line
- Lines should be numbered starting from 1
- Format: "NUMBER. TITLE" (e.g., "1. Some Story Title Here")
- There should be exactly 5 lines in the file
- No empty lines or extra whitespace at the end of the file

Before running the scraper, create the necessary project directory structure at /home/user/project/scraped_data/ if it doesn't exist.

After completing the scrape, create a simple log file at /home/user/project/scraped_data/scrape_log.txt that contains:
- Line 1: The exact text "STATUS: SUCCESS"
- Line 2: The exact text "ITEMS_SCRAPED: 5"
- Line 3: The exact text "SOURCE: https://news.ycombinator.com"
truth:
The agent should:
1. Create directory: /home/user/project/scraped_data/
2. Use a headless browser tool (Puppeteer/Playwright/etc.) to scrape https://news.ycombinator.com
3. Extract the top 5 story titles from the page (these are in elements with class "titleline" containing anchor tags)

Expected files to be created:

File 1: /home/user/project/scraped_data/hn_titles.txt
- Must contain exactly 5 lines
- Each line must match the pattern: "NUMBER. TITLE" where NUMBER is 1-5
- Example format:
  1. First Story Title
  2. Second Story Title
  3. Third Story Title
  4. Fourth Story Title
  5. Fifth Story Title
- No trailing newline or empty lines after line 5

File 2: /home/user/project/scraped_data/scrape_log.txt
- Must contain exactly 3 lines
- Line 1 must be exactly: "STATUS: SUCCESS"
- Line 2 must be exactly: "ITEMS_SCRAPED: 5"
- Line 3 must be exactly: "SOURCE: https://news.ycombinator.com"

Verification checks:
- Directory /home/user/project/scraped_data/ exists
- File /home/user/project/scraped_data/hn_titles.txt exists and has exactly 5 lines
- Each line in hn_titles.txt starts with "1. ", "2. ", "3. ", "4. ", or "5. " respectively
- File /home/user/project/scraped_data/scrape_log.txt exists
- scrape_log.txt contains the three required lines with exact text

Tools that may be used:
- Node.js with Puppeteer (npm install puppeteer)
- Node.js with Playwright (npm install playwright)
- Python with Playwright (pip install playwright)
- Python with Selenium

The container should have Node.js and npm available for installing headless browser packages.
